introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Santa Ana, The Azizi Firm is here to help. As the county seat of Orange County and one of the most densely populated cities in California, Santa Ana's busy streets and freeways create frequent accident risks. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our Santa Ana car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions, T-bone accidents at major intersections like Bristol Street and 17th Street, head-on collisions, hit and run accidents, drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents, rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents, truck accidents on the I-5 and SR-55, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents on dense urban streets, and bicycle accidents.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in Santa Ana
sections.body: Santa Ana's dense urban grid and proximity to major freeways (I-5, SR-55, SR-22) creates specific accident patterns. Common causes include distracted driving, speeding, failure to yield at uncontrolled intersections in residential neighborhoods, drunk driving, aggressive lane changes, and heavy traffic congestion during rush hours. The city's high population density means pedestrian and bicycle accidents are also common. Our attorneys investigate every accident to identify all liable parties.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in Santa Ana?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention, document the scene thoroughly, exchange information with other drivers, get witness contacts, and contact a car accident lawyer before speaking with insurance companies. If you are a Spanish speaker, we have bilingual staff ready to assist you.

faq.question: How much is my Santa Ana car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs, lost wages, pain and suffering, and available insurance coverage. Orange County courts have a reputation for careful deliberation in personal injury cases. We offer free case evaluations.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We are deeply familiar with Orange County courts and have a proven track record of successful recoveries for accident victims throughout the county.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Santa Ana, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
